headline: Huntsman Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Huntsman (NYSE:HUN) executives said first-quarter operating performance carried into the second quarter as the company pushed through price increases to offset higher raw material and logistics costs tied to the conflict in the Middle East, while also noting that longer-term demand visibility remain

raw.headline: Huntsman Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
